title: Sub-Item Automation Help
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is there a way to create the following automation: When all items have the status of _____ move item to group. 
If there is I seem to be missing it. Thanks!

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is there a way to create the following automation: When all items have the status of _____ move item to group.

If there is I seem to be missing it. Thanks!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @nsheetz86

This can be done by combining these two automations:

image1690×311 34.6 KB

The only thing to keep in mind is that there is no reverse. When any subitem changes to something else afterwards, the status of the item will stay unchanged. If you want this to be fully dynamic I advise to wait for the app “Rollup Sub Items” (to be expected in 2 weeks) that will change the status of the parent item back to something else if one of the subitems’ statuses changes to something else than Done.
